items.name_en: Celine Triomphe Bucket Bag, a bag I fell in love with at first sight. It's very special but not flashy. It's the right choice for low-key girls. The bag itself is very light, the bottom is structured so it doesn't deform, and it looks more premium. It's very easy to match, and can be sweet or edgy! Dimensions: Large 24 27 Small 20 22. Item No.: Large 6071 Small 6070

items.name_en: Celine Triomphe new chain shoulder bag, instantly fell in love with the runway look, love the Triomphe + chain design, black and gold is so beautiful in person! Super exquisite! New capacity is much larger than the old version, and a bit heavier, but I personally like the feeling of it resting on the shoulder for a more textured look. Anyway, absolutely love it, sisters who want it should grab it quickly! Size: 21cm
